zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Stourton於大約1150年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓時，他的父親Robert de Stourton42歲，母親Agnes de Stafford37歲。他於1172年與Mrs. William de Stourton在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1185年在英國英格蘭享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Stourton was born about 1150, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Stourton, was 42 and his mother, Agnes de Stafford, was 37. He married Mrs. William de Stourton in 1172, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1185, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Stourton est né environ 1150, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Stourton, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Stafford, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. William de Stourton en 1172, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1185, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Stourton um 1150 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Stourton 42 und seine Mutter Agnes de Stafford 37. Er hat 1172 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs. William de Stourton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1185 im Alter von 37 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Stourton è nato il circa 1150 nel Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Stourton, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Stafford, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. William de Stourton nel 1172, nel Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1185, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William de Stourton(이)가 대략 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Stourton(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Stafford(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1172년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 Mrs. William de Stourton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1185년 영국 잉글랜드에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Stourton родился около 1150 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Stourton было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Stafford, 37. Он умер около 1185 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.
